word: H678 - אָצִיל - ʼâtsîyl - aw-tseel' - Chief man

sections.paragraph:
Original: אציל

Transliteration: 'âtsı̂yl

Phonetic: aw-tseel'

BDB Definition:

  1. side, corner, chief
  2. (CLBL) nobles (figuratively)

Origin: from H680 (in its secondary sense of separation)

TWOT entry: 153b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
